title: gonocormus digitatus
intro: Gonocormus digitatus is a plant species in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the Fingered Gonocormus or Fingered Custard-Apple. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gonocormus digitatus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Gonocormus digitatus is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used to treat various ailments, and its fruit is consumed as a sweet, pulpy fruit.
